Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x12DC "MORDONSQUEST-0C00-12DC" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$3f sta $01 jsr $0c00 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Mordon's Quest.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $0C00 to set the correct screen colour before starting the game.
The loading screen is from the Spectrum version
